mapper.select: SELECT id, product_id as "productId", supplier_id as "supplierId", offer_type as "offerType", title, description, original_price as "originalPrice", offer_price as "offerPrice", discount_percent as "discountPercent", start_date as "startDate", end_date as "endDate", max_quantity as "maxQuantity", sold_quantity as "soldQuantity", seller_rating as "sellerRating", current_state as "stateId", created_at as "createdAt", updated_at as "updatedAt" FROM offer WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT current_state as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM offer GROUP BY current_state ORDER BY "count" DESC

SELECT id, product_id as "productId", supplier_id as "supplierId", offer_type as "offerType", title, original_price as "originalPrice", offer_price as "offerPrice", discount_percent as "discountPercent", seller_rating as "sellerRating", created_at as "createdAt" FROM offer WHERE current_state = 'PENDING_APPROVAL' AND supplier_id = #{supplierId} ORDER BY created_at ASC ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM offer WHERE current_state = 'LIVE' AND end_date IS NOT NULL AND end_date <= DATEADD('DAY', COALESCE(#{daysUntilExpiry}, 7), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

SELECT id, product_id as "productId", supplier_id as "supplierId", title, offer_type as "offerType", offer_price as "offerPrice", end_date as "endDate", DATEDIFF('DAY', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, end_date) as "daysRemaining" FROM offer WHERE current_state = 'LIVE' AND end_date IS NOT NULL AND end_date <= DATEADD('DAY', COALESCE(#{daysUntilExpiry}, 7), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ORDER BY end_date ASC ${pagination}

SELECT id, product_id as "productId", supplier_id as "supplierId", offer_type as "offerType", title, description, original_price as "originalPrice", offer_price as "offerPrice", discount_percent as "discountPercent", start_date as "startDate", end_date as "endDate", max_quantity as "maxQuantity", sold_quantity as "soldQuantity", current_state as "stateId" FROM offer WHERE product_id = #{productId}

SELECT id, product_id as "productId", supplier_id as "supplierId", offer_type as "offerType", title, description, original_price as "originalPrice", offer_price as "offerPrice", discount_percent as "discountPercent", start_date as "startDate", end_date as "endDate", max_quantity - sold_quantity as "remainingQuantity" FROM offer WHERE current_state = 'LIVE' AND product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY discount_percent DESC ${pagination}

SELECT id, product_id as "productId", supplier_id as "supplierId", offer_type as "offerType", title, original_price as "originalPrice", offer_price as "offerPrice", discount_percent as "discountPercent", start_date as "startDate", end_date as "endDate" FROM offer WHERE current_state = 'LIVE' AND product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY offer_price ASC LIMIT 1
